title: gymnocarpium dryopteris var. pumilum
intro: Gymnocarpium dryopteris var. pumilum is a lesser-known, variable fern that belongs to the Gymnocarpium genus and is considered a subspecies of the Dryopteris fern family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties that can help alleviate symptoms of various health conditions. The health benefits of Gymnocarpium dryopteris var. pumilum include reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and providing relief from respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and support immune function.
